resources.string:
"We and our partners may collect device information while you use this app. This information could be considered personal, and may include, but is not limited to, mobile advertising identifiers and location data, in order to offer personalized advertisements. This information sharing may be classified as a \"sale\" within the California Consumer Privacy Act, and you have the right to opt out if you wish.
To opt out, please tap on the Personalized Ads toggle to disable it. Note that this means you will see advertisements that may not be as relevant to your interests. Please view our Privacy Policy if you would like to learn more about our information practices."
Are you sure you want to be forgotten?
Something went wrong. Please try again later.

"By tapping on the Forget Me button, your personal information associated with this device will be removed from our servers, but not from our advertising partners'.
To remove your personal data shared with our advertising partners, please view our Privacy Policy / Partner List for instructions."
General Data Protection Regulation offers our users the option to opt out of personalized advertising.
This aircraft may not represent the carrier
Please press \"Continue\" if you choose to start using our app.
Enable the Creative Debugger SDK settings in order to view recent ads.
Displays more info about the list item.
To use %s you must agree to our Terms & Conditions and affirm you have reviewed our Privacy Policy
To use %s you must affirm that you have reviewed and acknowledged our Privacy Policy.

"What is your general impression of the Flight Tracker? (Simplicity, layout, usability, etc.)
Did you encounter any problems? (Bugs, crashes, unclarities, etc. ------------------------ App name: The Flight Tracker Android App Version: %1$s Build Number: %2$d Device: %3$s Android Version: %4$d (%5$s)
"
Tap here to e-mail us about the beta!
"Are you sure? You won't be able to scan a boarding pass if you deny the camera permission."
Boarding pass added to this flight.
Flight not found. Please try again or try the other search options.
Your boarding pass could not be added to this flight.
Boarding pass cannot be scanned because the app does not have the camera permission required for scanning. Please enable the permission in settings.
Auto add flights to calendar cannot be enabled because the app does not have the required calendar permission. Please enable the permission in settings.
"Are you sure? You won't be able to automatically add flights to your calendar if you deny the calendar permission."
Note that some of these data exchanges with our partners constitutes sales of personal data under applicable law.
If you ever change your mind, you can alter your choice by going to the settings of this app.
"%1$s won't work unless you enable Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device."
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device."
"%1$s won't run unless you update Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are currently updating."
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
The flight from %1$s to %2$s on %3$s was delayed and is eligible for compensation. Would you like to claim your refund?
This flight was delayed and is eligible for compensation. Would you like to claim your compensation?
The flight from %1$s to %2$s on %3$s was delayed and is eligible for compensation. Open for more details.
Are you sure you want to delete these flights?
Updated less than a minute ago
Enhance your experience with the pro upgrade
Automatically add flights to your calendar.
Import flights quickly and easily from your TripIt account

This app personalises your advertising experience through Google and other partners. By agreeing you’ll see ads that are more relevant to you. Depending on your privacy settings, our partners may collect and process personal data. Learn more.
By agreeing, you are confirming that you are over the age of 16.
By continuing, you agree to the Terms & Conditions and Privacy Policy.
Search for a flight in the search screen
Please check your internet connection and try again.
The information of this flight is out of date. Please be aware that the flight could be delayed or that due to a technical problem we are unable to receive updated information about this flight.
Cannot add flight to trip yet. Try again later
Cannot show non-tracked flight without internet!
Great. Our advertising partners won’t collect your data through this app for personalised advertising. You will still see ads, but they may not be as relevant to your interests.
To be able to give you a free and functional app you will see ads, but they may not be as relevant to your interest. No online profiles will be created.
By agreeing, you are confirming that you are over the age of 16 and are accepting non-personalised ads.
No Problem, We Have Non-Personalised Ads
Great! We hope you enjoy your personalised experience, but if you ever change your mind, you can change your choice by going to the settings of this app.

"This app personalizes your advertising experience through Google and other partners. By agreeing you'll see ads that are more relevant to you. Depending on your privacy settings, our partners may collect and process personal data. Learn more"
By agreeing, you are confirming that you are over the age of 16 and would like a personalized experience.
We do not store any personal data ourselves. Press Read More for information about personal data usage for advertisements.
We also love the app without ads! You have the option for an ad-free experience by upgrading to the paid version of the app.
"If you don't want to pay for this app, please understand that we need your permission to show you ads for monetisation."
"No, thank you. I'd rather see ads"
Seems like a problem on our end. Don’t worry, we are working on it. Try again later.
We couldn’t find results for your search query. Please modify your search
Waiting time. Check some things to do at the airport
Find your check-in desk on the nearby information panel
You have a layover. Check your next flight:
"Flight data provider hasn't shared the information yet. It will be updated here when available."
We suggest you to be at the gate 1h before your flight. Please check nearby information panel for more precise time.
Clear and intuitive step-by-step guide, from tracking a flight to landing.
Detailed information on airport procedures, boarding instructions, and landing updates for a seamless journey.
Real-time updates for gate changes, boarding and delays.
Stay informed every step of the way
Predict flight delays with our Forecast
An error has occurred when fetching the license.
Date does not match expected pattern: %1$s
Date out of expected year range %1$s - %2$s
Swipe to select a year, or tap to switch back to selecting a day
Scroll to show the next month
Scroll to show the previous month
Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.
Start date selection: %1$s – End date selection: %2$s
Tap to switch to Calendar view
Tap to switch to year view
You tracked a flight. It can be found here.
Enjoy your best flight experience with no ads
"• Unlimited real-time flight updates • Automated calendar sync • No Ads. No Stress. More Fun."
This app does not have any open source licenses.
Allow app to send you notifications?
"Thanks for your interest. We will share more once you're back online."
"You are back online! Let's pick up where we left off"
You are back online! Continue learning about %s
"We'll send you a notification with a link to the advertiser site."
Follow Family & and Friends Flights with Live Updates
Explore Flights & Routes All Over the World
License details for open source software
"We didn't find subscriptions or in-app purchases that could be restored."
Thank you for using this app. Please take the time to rate and review it on the App Store to let others know your experience! Thanks in advance!
Allow Ad to store image in Picture gallery?
Allow Ad to create a calendar event?
Please check your network connection and try again.
Please select at least one airport or airline.
Please select at least one airport.
Please enter a complete Flight Code

"Try again or try searching by %1$s
Hint: For connecting flights try to search for each leg separately."
Check your network connection and try again.
Here you can scan your boarding pass to find your flight
You can manage your notifications here.
Be aware of changes to your flight
Import flights from your TripIt account
Your remote profile will be erased
Show My Trips at the top of My Flights
Hi, Check out my flight info!
Get The Flight Tracker for more info
Reward will not be received before video completion.
• No Ads. No Stress. More Fun.
Track your flights on your homescreen
Renews automatically. You may cancel at any time at \"Subscriptions\" through the Google Play Store App.
Get Practical Widgets, Seat Maps and Turn off Ads
Automatically add flights to your calendar
Get notified about any flight changes

"
------------------------ App name: The Flight Tracker Android App Code: %1$s App Version: %2$s Build Number: %3$d Device: %4$s Android Version: %5$d (%6$s)
"
Something went wrong, try again later.
Could not add flight. Try again later
Are you sure you want to delete your trip?
Please select at least one flight.
Take control of your journey by organising it stress-free from start to finish 48 hours before your departure. Easy and live planning on the way!
Select a Flight from your list
Content only available for premium users
You need a subscription to use this feature!
